gaps: Facebook exposes Marketplace as a browser GraphQL surface rather than a stable public OpenAPI.
The raw HAR-to-spec pass collapsed many captured GraphQL operations into a single HTML endpoint, so this run uses an augmented internal spec from HAR operation names and document ids.
Live write verification is intentionally deferred until a human approves disposable real-account actions.
patterns: Local mirror and watch commands turn volatile search results into repeatable agent workflows.
Explicit write checkpoints and idempotency state are required before network mutations.

novel_features.name: AI listing drafter
novel_features.description: Draft a Marketplace title, description, and price suggestion from photos and notes.
novel_features.rationale: Combines local seller notes, photo context, and Marketplace composer price evidence into one agent-facing draft.
novel_features.example: facebook-market-pp-cli draft --photos chair-front.jpg,chair-tag.jpg --notes "walnut dining chair, small scratch on back" --json
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when preparing a seller listing before opening a write-gated post flow.

novel_features.name: Buy-side watcher
novel_features.description: Persist a Marketplace search watch with deterministic keyword, price, and distance filters.
novel_features.rationale: Turns volatile browser search traffic into repeatable local watch criteria that agents can rerun safely.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when the agent needs to monitor Marketplace without deciding relevance on every raw result.

novel_features.name: Watch matches
novel_features.description: Show new watch matches after deterministic filtering.
novel_features.rationale: Keeps the expensive judgment step bounded to plausible listings instead of running a two-stage LLM filter.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs the shortlist worth showing a human buyer.

novel_features.name: Stale listing query
novel_features.description: Find local seller listings older than seven days with no engagement.
novel_features.rationale: Requires local listing and engagement history that the live Marketplace page does not expose as one query.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when deciding which seller listings need price changes or renewal.

novel_features.name: Write-gated seller reply
novel_features.description: Prepare and send a seller inbox reply only when `--write` and doctor gating both pass.
novel_features.rationale: Adds idempotency, checkpoints, and receipt redaction around a risky Marketplace mutation.
novel_features.example: facebook-market-pp-cli reply --thread 1525836598898750 --message "Yes, it is still available." --write --json
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this only for human-approved sell-side messaging.

narrative.headline: A write-gated Marketplace seller CLI for search, listing creation, photo upload, local watches, and replies.
narrative.value_prop: Facebook Marketplace is an authenticated browser surface, so this CLI treats the browser session as the credential and keeps writes opt-in. It turns captured Marketplace GraphQL traffic into repeatable commands, then layers local watches, matches, stale listing checks, and seller drafting on top.
narrative.auth_narrative: Run `facebook-market-pp-cli auth login --chrome` while logged in to Facebook in Chrome. The captured browser session is the credential; do not store session material in the Dropbox project workspace.

quickstart.comment: Confirm the session still reaches Marketplace.
Run the captured search operation with the HAR-derived default variable payload.

troubleshoots.symptom: Marketplace commands return a login or checkpoint page.
troubleshoots.fix: Open Facebook in Chrome, resolve the checkpoint manually, rerun `auth login --chrome`, then rerun `doctor`.

troubleshoots.symptom: A write command refuses to run.
troubleshoots.fix: Rerun `doctor`; writes require both `--write` and a recent passing doctor check.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI for local, human-paced Facebook Marketplace workflows: searching, watching, triaging matches, drafting listings, and replying to seller inbox threads after explicit approval. Avoid using it for bulk automation or cross-platform scraping.

recipes.title: Create a buy-side watch
recipes.explanation: Stores deterministic filter criteria locally so future runs can compare new listings.

recipes.title: Draft a seller listing
recipes.command: facebook-market-pp-cli draft --photos chair-front.jpg,chair-tag.jpg --notes "walnut dining chair, small scratch" --json
recipes.explanation: Produces listing copy before any write-gated Marketplace mutation.
